VAL-DATA-002.evidence: GET /api/v1/pair_candles?pair=000300.SH&timeframe=1d returned 200 with 65 data points (≥60 required). Response contains columns ['date','open','high','low','close','volume'] with all OHLCV fields present. No null values in any row. Timestamps in millisecond epoch format. Data spans 2025-11-03 to 2026-01-30.
VAL-DATA-002.details: CSI 300 index data is available under symbol 000300.SH via the pair_candles endpoint. The data has 65 daily OHLCV records with no nulls. Symbol 399300.SZ returned 404 (not stored under that alias), but the validation contract specifies '399300.SZ or 000300.SH' — 000300.SH satisfies the requirement. Note: 000300.SH does not appear in /api/v1/available_pairs (which lists only stock pairs from market.db), but is accessible via pair_candles (served from index_cache.db).

steps.expected: 200 with CSI 300 daily OHLCV data, ≥60 data points
steps.observed: 200 with 65 data points, columns: [date, open, high, low, close, volume], no nulls

steps.expected: date, open, high, low, close, volume columns

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-DATA-002 passed. CSI 300 daily index data is available via pair_candles endpoint with symbol 000300.SH, returning 65 OHLCV data points (requirement: ≥60).
